title: Section 35I
content: 1[35I. Power of High Court or Supreme Court to require statement to be amended.]--- Omitted by The National Tax Tribunal Act, 2005 (Act 49 of 2005), s. 30 and Sch., Pt. VII-6 (w.e.f. 28-12-2005).
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 44 of 1980, s. 50 and Schedule V, Pt. II-2, for sections 35, 35A and 36 (w.e.f. 11-10-1982).
